failedUpdateExtraSpentLimit: failed to update extra spent limit
tagRequired: at least one tag is required
noPrimarySchedule: set a primary pay schedule in settings first
dateOutsidePayPeriod: date must fall within the current pay period
paidDateOutsidePayPeriod: paid date must fall within the current pay period
paidDateInFuture: paid date cannot be in the future
scheduledDateMismatchRecurring: scheduled date does not match recurring expense
scheduledDateMustBeFuture: scheduled date must be in the future
paymentAlreadyRecorded: this payment has already been recorded
scheduledDateMismatchPlanned: scheduled date does not match planned expense
datedBudgetRequiresBothDates: dated budgets require both start and end dates
endDateBeforeStart: end date must be on or after start date
cannotDeleteBudgetWithExpenses: cannot delete budget with recorded expenses
spendingLockedUntilStart: spending unlocks on the budget start date
dateOutsideBudgetPeriod: date must fall within the budget period
scheduledIncomeNotEditable: scheduled income cannot be edited here
scheduledIncomeNotDeletable: scheduled income cannot be deleted here
lastPaymentBeforeAnchor: last payment date must be on or after anchor date
dateMustBeFuture: date must be in the future
